en: Can you take a missus in your fight
Could I take my missus in a fight
You can't win a fight with your missus
Can't be done Physical verbal doesn't matter You cannot win You're in a team with them
It's you and her versus the fucking world It's our relationship for it
ko: 몸싸움이든 말싸움이든 상관없어. 이길 수 없어. 팀이니까.
너와 그녀 vs 세상이야. 우리 관계를 위한 거야.
